titleStmt.title: SII 23.377: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 377. (A.R. No. 377 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall

summary.p: Like No. 376 above this is also dated in the 19th year and 300th day of the same king, and registers the uḷvari of the lands granted for the worship of god Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār consecrated at Kulōttuṅgaśōḻanallūr alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ-Kuṟṟālam (Māyūram) in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by Ishabhadēvaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṟ Kārāṇai-Viḻuppaṟaiyar (the donor mentioned above) of Kuṟṟālam in Paṭṭiṉa-kūṟṟam a division of Gēyamāṇikkavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . yāṇṭu 10 9 ḷ 3 100- ṉāl A
ntarāyam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa tevatā
ṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvari
keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭi
ṉak kūṟṟattu kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ I
ṣapatevaṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭai
yāṉ kārāṇaiviḻupparaiyaṉ jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntūr
nāṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻa nallūrāṉa
kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu
Eḻuntaruḷivitta tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyārkku veṇṭu
nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka paṅkuṉimāsattu
comakkirāṇattu nirvārttaruḷiṉa nilam Umpa
kiṟa nilamāy Ivar Ittevar tiru
nāmattukkāṇiyāka nirvārttukkuṭu
tta Ivvūril śrīkoyilun tirumuṟṟamum
tirumaṭaviḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟ
ṟukku niṅkalāka nikkiṉa nilam nikki ni
kkiniṉṟa nilamāy yāṇṭu 10 9- tāvatu
pacāṉamutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam U
ṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili yiṭṭa nilam
5 Upa4ṟuṉāl I 3 10000 8 1000 3 100 naḷantata
niccayitta I 3 10000 1000 3 100 nta Uṭai
yār cuṅkantavirttaruḷiṉa kulo
ttuṅkacoḻatevarkku 2 10 1- ṟāvatu
Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nilattāl I 3 1000 7 100ma
Aṭaṅka Iṟai kaṭṭāta nilattāl muṉ
pu niccayitta I
I 6 10000 1000 8 100 n n=tam yāṇṭu 10 9- tāva
tu pacāṉamutal Antarāyam pāṭṭam U
ṭpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭamai
kku Ittevarai Etirāmāṇṭu taiy mā
sattut tiruppirutiṭai paṇṇumaḷavum cel
la Iṉnilattāl pattāvatu pacāṉamum Etirāmāṇṭukku tirup paṇikku Uṭalāvatu
Ivai puravari tiṉaikkaḷanāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam
perunallūruṭaiyāṉ ṉeḻuttu I
vaipuravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam pantaṇaina
llūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivaipurava
riśrīkaraṇanāyakam kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭ
ṭi neṟkuṉṟaṅ kiḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravariśrī
karaṇattu mukaveṭṭi perumaṅkalamuṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇattu
mukaveṭṭi Uḻantaiuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
veṇāṭṭaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai campe
ṟṟarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai vaṉnāṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṉakarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai paḻantiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai co
ḻakoṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.377 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
